"'''Big Quince'''" was a short story by [[Peter M. Schweighofer]] with illustrations by [[John Paul Lona]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 2|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 2]] by [[West End Games]] in [[May]] [[1994]]. Like many other Schweighofer/Lona collaborations, ''Big Quince'' is notable in that its narrative interchanges between prose text and textless comics-style illustrations.
